data.title: Moleculin Biotech: Attractive Risk/Reward Ahead of Pivotal Annamycin Phase 3 Readout Supports Buy Rating and $10 Target
data.description:
Analyst Jason McCarthy from Maxim Group maintained a Buy rating on Moleculin Biotech and keeping the price target at $10.00.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jason McCarthy has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors related to Moleculin Biotech’s lead asset, Annamycin, and the ongoing Phase 3 MIRACLE trial in relapsed/refractory AML. He highlights that prior data suggest Annamycin can induce rapid complete remissions with limited cardiotoxicity, and that the 40% blinded CR rate reported in February 2026 appears unusually strong given cytarabine’s historically weak performance, especially after only one treatment cycle.

McCarthy also underscores the upcoming unblinded interim readout in mid-2026 (n=45) as a major value inflection point that could further de-risk the program and drive the stock. His valuation work, which applies a risk-adjusted revenue model for Annamycin in the U.S. and EU along with a steep discount rate, still supports a $10 price target, suggesting meaningful upside from current levels. On this basis, he maintains a Buy recommendation, viewing the risk/reward as attractive heading into key clinical milestones.

MBRX’s price has also changed dramatically for the past six months – from $0.402 to $2.060, which is a 412.44% increase.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
